lyrics.text: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

lyrics.text: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
lyrics.pinyin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
lyrics.trans: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

lyrics.text: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

lyrics.text: 答应你 从今起
lyrics.pinyin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
lyrics.trans: I promise you, from this day forward

lyrics.text: 做你的妻和你永不分离
lyrics.pinyin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
lyrics.trans: To be your wife and never be apart from you

lyrics.text: 已经很难动心在我这样的年纪
lyrics.pinyin: yǐ jīng hěn nán dòng xīn zài wǒ zhè yàng de nián jì
lyrics.trans: It's hard to fall in love easily at my age

lyrics.text: 有时会回避也有时候逢场作戏
lyrics.pinyin: yǒu shí huì huí bì yě yǒu shí hòu féng chǎng zuò xì
lyrics.trans: Sometimes I'd avoid it, sometimes I'd just play along

lyrics.text: 成年人的默契 酒精麻痹过去
lyrics.pinyin: chéng nián rén de mò qì, jiǔ jīng má bì guò qù
lyrics.trans: The unspoken rules of adults, numbing the past with alcohol

lyrics.text: 经历了几段情让一颗心慢慢封闭
lyrics.pinyin: jīng lì le jǐ duàn qíng ràng yī kē xīn màn màn fēng bì
lyrics.trans: Experiencing a few relationships slowly closed off my heart

lyrics.text: 也许这正是天意老天让我遇见了你
lyrics.pinyin: yě xǔ zhè zhèng shì tiān yì lǎo tiān ràng wǒ yù jiàn le nǐ
lyrics.trans: Maybe it's destiny that heaven let me meet you

lyrics.text: 像一只春天的小鹿撞进了我的怀里
lyrics.pinyin: xiàng yī zhī chūn tiān de xiǎo lù zhuàng jìn le wǒ de huái lǐ
lyrics.trans: Like a little spring deer rushing into my arms

lyrics.text: 夏日海风的热情 融化了我这块冰
lyrics.pinyin: xià rì hǎi fēng de rè qíng, róng huà le wǒ zhè kuài bīng
lyrics.trans: The passion of the summer sea breeze melted my icy heart

lyrics.text: 冬季柔软的围巾天冷了会把我抱紧
lyrics.pinyin: dōng jì róu ruǎn de wéi jīn tiān lěng le huì bǎ wǒ bào jǐn
lyrics.trans: Like a soft winter scarf holding me tight when it gets cold

lyrics.text: 幸运却害怕失去 对爱情不再相信
lyrics.pinyin: xìng yùn què hài pà shī qù, duì ài qíng bù zài xiāng xìn
lyrics.trans: Feeling lucky but afraid of losing, I had stopped believing in love

lyrics.text: 你触摸我的犹豫 你抚慰我的忧郁
lyrics.pinyin: nǐ chū mō wǒ de yóu yù, nǐ fǔ wèi wǒ de yōu yù
lyrics.trans: You touched my hesitation, you soothed my melancholy

lyrics.text: 曾经我心如灰烬 却因你泛起涟漪
lyrics.pinyin: céng jīng wǒ xīn rú huī jìn, què yīn nǐ fàn qǐ lián yī
lyrics.trans: My heart was once like ashes, but you caused ripples in it

lyrics.text: 从那一刻你吻我趁我还来不及反应
lyrics.pinyin: cóng nà yī kè nǐ wěn wǒ chèn wǒ hái lái bù jí fǎn yìng
lyrics.trans: From the moment you kissed me before I could even react

lyrics.text: 每当我慢慢的
lyrics.pinyin: měi dāng wǒ màn màn de
lyrics.trans: Whenever I slowly

lyrics.text: 靠近鼻翼或脸颊的回应
lyrics.pinyin: kào jìn bí yì huò liǎn jiá de huí yìng
lyrics.trans: Lean in for a response on the nose or cheek

lyrics.text: 当我越来越接近 你眼神如此的肯定
lyrics.pinyin: dāng wǒ yuè lái yuè jiē jìn, nǐ yǎn shén rú cǐ de kěn dìng
lyrics.trans: As I get closer, your eyes are so certain

lyrics.text: 将你捧在我掌心 这一生为你all in
lyrics.pinyin: jiāng nǐ pěng zài wǒ zhǎng xīn, zhè yī shēng wèi nǐ all in
lyrics.trans: Holding you in the palm of my hand, going all in for you this lifetime

lyrics.text: Baby我愿为你付出一切 包括我的命
lyrics.pinyin: Baby wǒ yuàn wèi nǐ fù chū yī qiè, bāo kuò wǒ de mìng
lyrics.trans: Baby, I am willing to give everything for you, even my life

lyrics.text: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

lyrics.text: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
lyrics.pinyin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
lyrics.trans: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

lyrics.text: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

lyrics.text: 答应你 从今起
lyrics.pinyin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
lyrics.trans: I promise you, from this day forward

lyrics.text: 做你的妻和你永不分离
lyrics.pinyin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
lyrics.trans: To be your wife and never be apart from you

lyrics.text: 习惯亲吻你额头 习惯了牵着手
lyrics.pinyin: xí guàn qīn wěn nǐ é tóu, xí guàn le qiān zhe shǒu
lyrics.trans: Used to kissing your forehead, used to holding hands

lyrics.text: 习惯了互相依靠 月光下慢慢走
lyrics.pinyin: xí guàn le hù xiāng yī kào, yuè guāng xià màn màn zǒu
lyrics.trans: Used to relying on each other, walking slowly under the moonlight

lyrics.text: 有你的日子之后 我不再出去喝酒
lyrics.pinyin: yǒu nǐ de rì zi zhī hòu, wǒ bù zài chū qù hē jiǔ
lyrics.trans: Since the days I've had you, I don't go out drinking anymore

lyrics.text: 我学会珍惜感情 学会感恩这所有
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ xué huì zhēn xī gǎn qíng, xué huì gǎn ēn zhè suǒ yǒu
lyrics.trans: I've learned to cherish love and be grateful for everything

lyrics.text: 春天公园的小路看着樱花散步回家
lyrics.pinyin: chūn tiān gōng yuán de xiǎo lù kàn zhe yīng huā sàn bù huí jiā
lyrics.trans: Walking home along the park path in spring, looking at cherry blossoms

lyrics.text: 夏日清凉的午夜试着帮你吹干头发
lyrics.pinyin: xià rì qīng liáng de wǔ yè shì zhe bāng nǐ chuī gān tóu fa
lyrics.trans: Trying to blow-dry your hair on cool summer midnights

lyrics.text: 冬天你泡着热茶 我陪你窝在沙发
lyrics.pinyin: dōng tiān nǐ pào zhe rè chá, wǒ péi nǐ wō zài shā fā
lyrics.trans: You brew hot tea in winter, and I cuddle with you on the sofa

lyrics.text: 相濡以沫成了彼此生命中的牵挂
lyrics.pinyin: xiāng rú yǐ mò chéng le bǐ cǐ shēng mìng zhōng de qiān guà
lyrics.trans: Supporting each other through everything, we became the anchors in each other's lives

lyrics.text: 何德何能 我能拥有如此温柔的女人
lyrics.pinyin: hé dé hé néng, wǒ néng yōng yǒu rú cǐ wēn róu de nǚ rén
lyrics.trans: How did I get so lucky to have such a gentle woman

lyrics.text: 在最低沉的时候陪伴我让我再启程
lyrics.pinyin: zài zuì dī chén de shí hòu péi bàn wǒ ràng wǒ zài qǐ chéng
lyrics.trans: Accompanying me at my lowest points and giving me the strength to start again

lyrics.text: 用你最好的青春安慰我躁郁的灵魂
lyrics.pinyin: yòng nǐ zuì hǎo de qīng chūn ān wèi wǒ zào yù de líng hún
lyrics.trans: Using your best years to comfort my restless soul

lyrics.text: 一颗心渐渐地安稳
lyrics.pinyin: yī kē xīn jiàn jiàn de ān wěn
lyrics.trans: My heart is gradually finding peace

lyrics.text: 因为你一次次包容
lyrics.pinyin: yīn wèi nǐ yī cì cì bāo róng
lyrics.trans: Because of your endless forgiveness

lyrics.text: Oh my babe 对你说声感谢
lyrics.pinyin: Oh my babe duì nǐ shuō shēng gǎn xiè
lyrics.trans: Oh my babe, let me say thank you

lyrics.text: 有了你 这世界从此不再凛冽
lyrics.pinyin: yǒu le nǐ, zhè shì jiè cóng cǐ bù zài lǐn liè
lyrics.trans: With you, this world is no longer freezing cold

lyrics.text: 答应你 我一定爱得更加热切
lyrics.pinyin: dā yìng nǐ, wǒ yī dìng ài de gèng jiā rè qiè
lyrics.trans: I promise you, I will love you even more passionately

lyrics.text: 爱到底 就算整个宇宙毁灭
lyrics.pinyin: ài dào dǐ, jiù suàn zhěng gè yǔ zhòu huǐ miè
lyrics.trans: Loving you to the end, even if the whole universe is destroyed

lyrics.text: 穿过漫长的岁月
lyrics.pinyin: chuān guò màn cháng de suì yuè
lyrics.trans: Through the long years

lyrics.text: 终于站在你面前
lyrics.pinyin: zhōng yú zhàn zài nǐ miàn qián
lyrics.trans: Finally standing right in front of you

lyrics.text: 无论健康与否 富贵贫贱
lyrics.pinyin: wú lùn jiàn kāng yǔ fǒu, fù guì pín jiàn
lyrics.trans: Whether in sickness or in health, for richer or poorer

lyrics.text: 我会永远在你身边
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ huì yǒng yuǎn zài nǐ shēn biān
lyrics.trans: I will forever be by your side

lyrics.text: 看你为我带上婚戒
lyrics.pinyin: kàn nǐ wèi wǒ dài shàng hūn jiè
lyrics.trans: Watching you put the wedding ring on me

lyrics.text: 听你说出爱的誓言
lyrics.pinyin: tīng nǐ shuō chū ài de shì yán
lyrics.trans: Hearing you speak your vows of love

lyrics.text: 手相牵
lyrics.pinyin: shǒu xiāng qiān
lyrics.trans: Our hands held together

lyrics.text: 我们的爱到永远
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ men de ài dào yǒng yuǎn
lyrics.trans: Our love will last forever

lyrics.text: I got a ring 看着你眼睛说我愿意
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, kàn zhe nǐ yǎn jīng shuō wǒ yuàn yì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, looking into your eyes and saying "I do"

lyrics.text: 这颗心 交给你 希望你好好珍惜
lyrics.pinyin: zhè kē xīn, jiāo gěi nǐ, xī wàng nǐ hǎo hǎo zhēn xī
lyrics.trans: I'm giving this heart to you, I hope you will cherish it well

lyrics.text: I got a ring 因为幸福喜极而泣
lyrics.pinyin: I got a ring, yīn wèi xìng fú xǐ jí ér qì
lyrics.trans: I got a ring, crying tears of joy because of happiness

lyrics.text: 答应你 从今起
lyrics.pinyin: dā yìng nǐ, cóng jīn qǐ
lyrics.trans: I promise you, from this day forward

lyrics.text: 做你的妻和你永不分离
lyrics.pinyin: zuò nǐ de qī hé nǐ yǒng bù fēn lí
lyrics.trans: To be your wife and never be apart from you
